title: Wilder Flowers
description: Adds various wildflowers, clover patches, and flower garlands. Revel in nature's boutique!
body: ## Overview This mod adds a host of new foliage to vanilla world generation through the addition of wildflowers. These blooms can be made into flower garland decor, which can be both worn and placed. Wilder Flowers adds clover patches to various biomes as well. ## FAQ - Will this mod be ported to other versions/loaders? - [DavigJ](https://modrinth.com/user/davigj) actively supports the Forge versions of the mod, and [cassiancc](https://modrinth.com/user/Cassian) maintains the Fabric and NeoForge versions. There is no plan to port to any older versions of Minecraft or support Forge past 1.20.1, ports to latest will happen when they are ready. - **Note**: Fabric support on versions older than 1.21.1 is discontinued. Users on Fabric 1.20.1 can use [Kilt](https://modrinth.com/mod/kilt). ## License [![Code license (MIT)](https://img.shields.io/badge/code%20license-MIT-green.svg?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/davigj/wilder-flowers/blob/main/LICENSE.txt) Wilder Flowers is available under the open source MIT License. Note that this means you are required to attribute the mod if you use any content from it in your own projects. ## Credits Feel free to direct any suggestions towards the [issue tracker](https://github.com/davidjjung/wilderflowers/issues)! This mod's features were originally implemented in [Raspberry Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/raspberry-core) as an original feature for Raspberry Flavoured. It was iterated on there before being extracted into its own mod. Flower implementation was done by [Kobber](https://modrinth.com/user/kobber) and [cassiancc](https://modrinth.com/user/Cassian), textures were made by [ProbablyEkho](https://modrinth.com/user/ProbablyEkho). The port to a standalone Forge 1.19.2/1.20.1 mod was done by [DavigJ](https://modrinth.com/user/davigj), and the port beyond to multiloader 1.21.x was done by [cassiancc](https://modrinth.com/user/Cassian).
